_source: EPA FuelEconomy.gov combE column + IEA Global EV Outlook 2023 + ICCT 2021
_note: Fallback efficiency values used ONLY when EPA combE or comb08 fields are 0 or missing. Primary data always comes from vehicles.csv live columns.

_primary_data.ICE_column: co2TailpipeGpm (grams CO2 per mile, EPA measured)

EV_kWh_per_100km.derivation: 22.5 kWh/100km ÷ 100 = 0.225 kWh/km. Note: combE in EPA is kWh/100mi, converted to kWh/km in engine.
EV_kWh_per_100km.source: IEA Global EV Outlook 2023 p.47: global average BEV efficiency 19-25 kWh/100km
EV_kWh_per_100km.real_data: Model 3: combE=26.8 kWh/100mi → 0.167 kWh/km. Model Y: combE=27.97 → 0.174 kWh/km. Kona EV: combE=28.0 → 0.174 kWh/km

ICE_L_per_100km.derivation: EPA comb08 MPG fallback 25 MPG → 9.41 L/100km. 7.56 is ICCT 2021 global fleet average.
ICE_L_per_100km.source: ICCT 2021 LCA supplementary: average new ICE 2020 = 7.1-8.2 L/100km globally
ICE_L_per_100km.real_data: Civic: comb08=28 MPG → 8.4 L/100km. Camry: comb08=21 MPG → 11.2 L/100km

Hybrid_L_per_100km.source: Same as ICE fallback. Real hybrid data from EPA comb08: Prius = 41 MPG → 5.74 L/100km
Hybrid_L_per_100km.real_data: Prius: comb08=41 MPG → 5.74 L/100km (significantly better than ICE)
